name: Meta-tool architecture (6 meta-tools)
applicability: Expose 6 discovery tools (search, get-schema, auth, execute, workbench, bash) rather than loading 1000+ tool definitions upfront. Inverts MCP assumption.
home_connection: JASON-OS scale — a meta-skill that searches and loads SKILL.md on demand would be more context-efficient than current 'load SKILL.md at invocation' approach.

name: Native vs MCP tradeoff with token arithmetic
applicability: ~55K tokens for 5-server MCP setup before conversation starts. Native = context control + interception (logging, retry, approval); MCP = simplicity.
home_connection: SoNash has 3 MCP servers (memory, sonarcloud, context7). Informs whether JASON-OS distributes capabilities as MCP vs native.

name: llms.txt / llms-full.txt AI-readable doc index
applicability: Nascent AI-readable documentation standard (Jeremy Howard, 2024-09). Composio is an early adopter. Generator pattern: convert markdown docs to structured llms.txt.
home_connection: If JASON-OS publishes documentation, this format makes skills/agents discoverable by other LLM systems. Candidate: scripts/docs/generate-llms-txt.js from CLAUDE.md + SKILL.md corpus.

name: Multi-framework provider parity matrix
applicability: 11+ framework integrations (Claude Agent SDK, Anthropic SDK, OpenAI Agents+API, Gemini, Vercel AI, LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, Mastra) with consistent surface.
home_connection: Not directly adopted — SoNash is Firebase/Next.js, not a multi-framework agent lib. But the table FORMAT is extractable for any SoNash compatibility doc.

name: Terminology migration table (v1→v3)
applicability: Explicit v1→v3 rename mapping: 'entity ID' → 'user ID', 'integration' → 'auth config'. Published prominently on landing.
home_connection: Directly applicable to T29 Cat G pattern (scoring.classification 'extract'→'park-for-later'). SoNash could publish a SCHEMA_MIGRATIONS.md with similar rename tables for v3.0 enum changes.

name: AI code-generator rules section
applicability: Dedicated section with enforcement rules for LLMs generating Composio integration code. Covers provider import patterns, user-ID handling, native-vs-MCP choice.
home_connection: Mirrors SoNash CLAUDE.md/SKILL.md/CONVENTIONS.md triad but with cross-framework parity. Could inspire a PATTERNS_FOR_AI_CODE_GEN.md section in docs/agent_docs/.

name: Workbench (sandboxed tool execution)
applicability: Sandboxed environment for executing tool calls. Isolated from user environment.
home_connection: SoNash doesn't need sandboxing — all functions run in Firebase Cloud Functions with App Check. Noted but not adoptable.

name: Event triggers (dual webhook+polling)
applicability: Subscribe to external events; dual model supports webhook-capable services + polling fallback for services that don't support webhooks.
home_connection: SoNash uses Firestore listeners + scheduled functions. Composio's polling/webhook abstraction is interesting but solving a problem SoNash doesn't have (multi-tenant external event aggregation).

name: White-label auth customization
applicability: Brand the OAuth consent screen with customer's identity for multi-tenant products.
home_connection: SoNash is single-tenant (recovery notebook for individual users); white-label not applicable.
